title: Sandokan contro il leopardo di Sarawak
original_title: Sandokan contro il leopardo di Sarawak
overview: Samoa is kidnapped and held captive hypnotized in caves by her cousin Charles Druk, whose father has been murdered by her future husband Sandokan, lord of Malaya. Assisted by his European friend Iannis, he wants to rescue her.
